summary.authoritative_rule: persistent add permission now has an internal quality ladder, but it remains a local supervision structure rather than broader permission authority

triage_rows.rationale: the highest close-location persistent candidates align most closely with full-quality add behavior inside the persistent family surface
the bridge tier is where full-like and probe-like persistent candidates still mix, so it should remain a watch layer rather than a clean authorization
the lower close-location persistent cases still continue, but they should not be overstated as full-quality add permission

interpretation: V1.34FI turns the first persistent-permission quality audit into a governance verdict.
The add branch now has internal quality structure inside its cleanest local family, but that structure remains supervision-only.
